title: phragmipedium roezlii
intro: Phragmipedium roezlii, commonly known as the Roell's phragmipedium, is a species of orchid native to South America. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Phragmipedium roezlii are often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
